subject: Re: Fwd: Fw: VI Tennis Association
body:
whatever he wants


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, May 4, 2007 12:08:35 PM
Subject: Fwd: Fw: VI Tennis Association


During GSJ conversations with Bill McComb, Bill asked me if we would be interested in supporting the team again this year.  I forwarded this to Cecile.  Please advise.
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
